settings.title: Licensed, tested, and on the record.
settings.subtitle: FSSAI 10021021000439. Lab-tested every batch. Public test reports. Traceable recall protocol.

settings.body:
Issued by the Food Safety and Standards Authority of India. Manufacturer category. Valid through Dec 2027. Posted at our workshop in Gandhinagar, on every retort pouch we ship, and on our website footer.

Verify: visit foscos.fssai.gov.in → Licence Verification → enter the number.

settings.heading: What we hold, and why each matters.
settings.item_1_desc: The headline licence. Required for any food brand that processes, packs, or distributes in India. Includes annual inspection and renewable every 5 years.
settings.item_2_desc: A separate notification under FSSAI 2.4 (2017) for products labelled "probiotic." Requires a minimum CFU count, strain identification, and stability data per batch.
settings.item_3_desc: Voluntary. Independent third-party audit of facility cleanliness, staff training, equipment calibration, and traceability logs. Renewed annually.
settings.item_4_desc: Maps every step of production where contamination could occur and defines a control point. Required by Indian food retailers like Nature's Basket.
settings.item_5_desc: International food-safety management standard. Combines HACCP with quality-management practices. Audited every 3 years by an accredited body.
settings.item_6_desc: Required to export processed food from India. We ship to UAE and Singapore today — license activated April 2026.

settings.heading: Last four quarters, downloadable.
settings.body:
Every batch goes to a NABL-accredited lab. Quarterly summary reports are public — total viable count, pathogen screening (Salmonella, Listeria, E. coli), water activity, salt content.

Download: Q1 2026 · Q4 2025 · Q3 2025 · Q2 2025 (links available on request — email support@gutbasket.com)

settings.heading: If something ever goes wrong.
settings.body:
Every kit is stamped with a batch code. We retain that code → factory shift → ingredient lot → supplier batch chain for 24 months.

If a batch is suspected: we email everyone who received it within 48 hours, replace or refund without questions, and notify FSSAI per Schedule II of the Recall Procedure 2017.

This has happened zero times. We're prepared anyway.

settings.title: Compliance & regulatory queries
settings.desc: For wholesale partners, retailers, or regulators needing copies of certifications.
